name: Fraport Annual Reports (AEM workaround)
description: Fraport AG annual reports via AEM (Adobe Experience Manager) URL pattern. Main site is Cloudflare-protected; AEM renditions path bypasses it.

workaround_paths.description: AEM JCR content rendition path (bypasses Cloudflare)

known_issues: Do not use Playwright or browser automation. AEM workaround is sufficient.
notes: AEM workaround verified working. AR 2023 confirmed 13.8MB download. Update URL pattern for each year as released.
